description_long: This is a weathered, upright stone headstone set atop a rectangular stone base, typical of older graveyards. The headstone features a rounded top with a carved relief, possibly floral or symbolic, and an inscription panel with faint, partially legible text. The stone surface shows signs of age, including discoloration, moss, and erosion, especially near the base. The back of the headstone is plain and unadorned, with visible staining and surface wear. The base is blocky and rough, providing stable support for the upright marker. The overall appearance suggests a traditional, historic grave marker made primarily from stone.
description: A weathered upright stone headstone with a rounded top, carved relief, and inscription, set on a rectangular stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved relief, inscription panel, and weathered stone surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the headstone and the layered stone base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back with visible staining and surface wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the rough base.
